meaning: 1. erhua variant of 女孩[nǚ hái]
sentence: 那个女孩儿唱歌特别好听。
pinyin: Nà ge nǚ hái ér chàng gē tè bié hǎo tīng.

sentence: 网上有海量的学习资料。
pinyin: Wǎng shang yǒu hǎiliàng de xuéxí zīliào.
english: There is a huge volume of study materials online.

sentence: 这家超市提供免费配送服务。
pinyin: Zhè jiā chāoshì tígōng miǎnfèi pèisòng fúwù.
english: This supermarket offers free delivery service.

sentence: 周末我们去看了一个画展。
pinyin: Zhōumò wǒmen qù kàn le yī gè huàzhǎn.
english: We went to see an art exhibition over the weekend.

meaning: 1. to seal; 2. to confirm; 3. to corroborate; 4. to verify
sentence: 他说的话印证了我之前的判断。
pinyin: Tā shuō de huà yìnzhèng le wǒ zhīqián de pànduàn.
english: What he said confirmed my earlier judgment.
